description_long: This is a modern, single-family house situated within a fenced rectangular lot featuring a well-maintained green lawn. The house has a flat roof and a clean, boxy architectural style with large, rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small patio area, and a backyard with palm trees, a swing set, and a circular fire pit. The perimeter is enclosed by a dark, solid fence, providing privacy and security. The main entryway is accessible via a paved path and features a simple, understated door without a porch or overhang. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by a fenced yard, driveway, and landscaped lawn with outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from a corner angle, highlighting the backyard with palm trees, a swing set, and a fire pit, as well as the side of the house with large windows.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the rear, displaying the backyard, patio, and the driveway with two cars, as well as the main entryway and more of the lawn.
description_view_2: View 2 is a direct front view, focusing on the driveway, main entrance, and the open lawn area, with the cars and entry gate clearly visible.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the side yard, palm trees, and the swing set, with the driveway and cars visible to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, accessed by a paved path, minimal decorative elements
